name: DSG Global Inc.
business: DSG Global Inc. designs, manufactures, and markets fleet management solutions for the golf industry, as well as commercial, government, and military applications. It also distributes electric vehicles through its Imperium Motor division and sells golf carts under the Vantage and Shelby brands.

exposures.sentence: DSG Global Inc. is a technology development company based in Surrey, British Columbia, Canada, engaged in the design, manufacture, and marketing of fleet management solutions for the golf industry, as well as commercial, government and military applications.

In 2020, we established an electric vehicle marketing and distribution division, Imperium Motor Company (Imperium USA) and its Canadian counterpart in 2021, Imperium Motor of Canada Corporation (Imperium Canada), and in 2021 we formed a golf cart division, AC Golf Carts, Inc. with exclusive world-wide rights of Shelby Cobra golf carts.
We have developed in-house a proprietary combination of hardware and software that is marketed around the world as the INFINITY TAG system.
We have completed several successful pilots of the TAG system in other markets such as agriculture and commercial fleet operations.

Imperium Motor Company USA and Canada (Imperium) is a global technology company - specializing in fleet management, vehicle charging network, lithium air battery development, and marketing and distribution of electric vehicles.

In the next 2 years, sports betting will generate $10B / licensed in 20+ States. In negotiations with leading mobile gaming developers. DSG's existing infinity screens work with current gaming technology.
Programmatic Advertising Revenue is a new source of revenue that we believe has the potential to be strategic for us in the future.

catalysts.sentence: Liteborne is expected to begin importing vehicles in Q4 2023 with initial sales reaching up to $130,000,0000 in Rev and in 2024 Revenues will reach up to $850,000,000.

catalysts.event: Satisfy majority of performance obligations on remaining contracts
catalysts.sentence: The Company expects to satisfy the majority of its performance obligations on the remaining contracts during fiscal 2023 totaling approximately $7.5 million.

tamClaims.claim: Global LSEV market size expected to reach $68B by 2025
tamClaims.sentence: The global market size for LSEVs is expected to reach $68B by 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Global electric vehicle market size projected to reach $56.7B by 2025 from $11.9B in 2017
tamClaims.sentence: The global electric vehicle market size was valued at $11.9B in 2017 and is projected to reach $56.7B by 2025, growing at a CAGR of 22.3% from 2018 to 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Number of EVs on U.S. roads projected to reach 18.7 million in 2030
tamClaims.sentence: The number of electric vehicles (EVs) on U.S. roads is projected to reach 18.7 million in 2030, up from 1 million at the end of 2018.
The primary market for our TAG system is the golf industry, with over 40,000 golf operations worldwide.

tamClaims.claim: 4 million golf carts in the world market
tamClaims.sentence: 4 Million golf carts in the world market.
